header_subtitle: Changes are saved automatically. Reload the page for them to take effect.
language_hint: Language of the settings page and side panel UI.
scope_hint_html: One domain per line. Subdomains are matched automatically — entering example.com also matches www.example.com and blog.example.com. The * wildcard is also supported (e.g. *keyword* matches any domain containing keyword).
mode_blacklist: Blacklist (enabled on sites not in the list)
mode_whitelist: Whitelist (enabled only on sites in the list)
trigger_hint: Click: open the link in the side panel on click. Hover: automatic preview after hovering longer than the delay.
hover_note: Hover preview requires the side panel to already be open. The first time, click the toolbar side-panel icon or the extension icon to open it.
trigger_click_note_html: Want a link to skip the Side Panel? Hold ⌘ / Ctrl / Shift / Alt while clicking — it will open in a new tab as usual. To always skip a whole site, add its domain under Scope above.
link_scope_hint_html: By default only target="_blank" links (the ones a page asks to open in a new tab) are intercepted. Enable the option below to also send same-tab (non-_blank) links to the side panel.
link_scope_include_nonblank: Also open non-_blank links in the side panel
reset_confirm: Reset to defaults? The domain list will be cleared.
sidepanel_welcome_body: Click any link on the left and it opens here, side-by-side.
sidepanel_welcome_bypass_html: Hold <kbd>⌘</kbd> / <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> while clicking to open in a new tab instead.
sidepanel_blocked_body_html: This site's security policy (X-Frame-Options / CSP) blocks embedding in an iframe.
sidepanel_blocked_note: This restriction is set by the site itself — not by the extension.
